hooks.command: git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR 2>/dev/null | grep -qiE '\.(flac|wav|mp3|m4a|aac|ogg|oga|opus|wv|ape|wma|aiff|aif|alac|dsf|dff)$' && { echo 'Blocked: audio/copyrighted media is staged (CLAUDE.md Critical Rule #8). Unstage it (git restore --staged <file>); test audio outside the repo.' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
